message:
test(core): property-based tests for tantivy_reindex and tantivy_quality (28 tests)

proptest_tantivy_reindex.rs (15 tests): BackfillRange serde roundtrips,
includes() correctness for All/OrdinalRange/TimeRange with boundary checks,
past_end() correctness (All→never, TimeRange→never, OrdinalRange→ordinal>end),
past_end implies !includes invariant, ReindexProgress serde.

proptest_tantivy_quality.rs (13 tests): QueryClass enum serde/distinctness,
LatencyBudget serde, AssertionResult serde, QueryTestResult serde,
QualityReport serde with passed+failed==total_queries consistency check,
default_latency_budgets() coverage/positivity/ordering invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
